Set 1  ·  Book 7
Meeting People + Asking Names
Your child will be able to meet people politely, say their name, and ask someone else’s name in Chinese.
📚 Key Words You'll Learn
你叫什么名字  What is your name?她  She他  He狗  Dog我叫  My name is名字  Name

what is your name

/nǐ jiào shén me míng zi/

(nee3 jeeao shren2 me meeng2 dzuh5)

叫/jiào/-call

什么/shén me/-what

名字/míng zi/-name
